record: Report Zero corpus-level derived claims (D-1 dress rehearsal)
revision: 3 — round-2 residuals patched (per-claim captured_units with actual hashes; exact M2 like sums from the frozen comments substrate; similarity claim de-organic'd; hzq flanker restructure). Round-1 patch (revision 2) recomputed attention rows mechanically and materialized per-claim provenance. See aphrodite_report_zero_review_round1_adjudication_v0.md (rounds 1 and 2). Root fields below are an informational envelope; the per-claim fields are authoritative.
creator: GentsScents (channel UC9IImcLkUdmURWtQhxu8VwQ; registry acct_yt_fragrance_010)

product:creed.aventus.read: the intake original #1 lives in this corpus as the REFERENCE POINT of the clone economy, not as a reviewed product: Explorer positioning (8QpC36Q_eeM), most-cloned archetype (q0oiKqeghks), Kaaf Noir target-selection critique (_FUdh1ryqWI '90% K and 10% [Aventus], if that... if there was more Aventus than K, that would have been a more interesting proposal'), Aventus-style chains (sw34VzzWlvA x2); the Absolu flanker separately draws clone-target attention in 2 videos (see the aventus-absolu attention row)

product:dior.sauvage.read: strong direct-original attention with positive stance (S-tier, A-tier, 'best ever made') PLUS clone-target attention (Zenith Blue) PLUS flanker leadership as line-level discourse (Sauvage Elixir ranked #1 + credited with creating the elixir trend, hzqxkp3OqQw@1006480 — Elixir itself is a distinct unresolved flanker under the granularity rule; this note is discourse evidence, not a resolved Elixir claim)

value.tier_similarity: creator's self-funded editorial clone coverage (see adj.organic_brand_product_presence — 'organic' wording removed, round-2 correction AR-02) spans designer-inspired AND niche-inspired clones — exactly the buyer's target_tier_position [niche, designer]
value.note_family_similarity: covered clones concentrate in fresh/citrus/woody/sweet 'blue' territory = the buyer's required+acceptable families
value.occasion_similarity: versatile/daily positioning dominates creator verdicts ('wear whenever you want' recurs) = buyer occasion_targets [versatile, daily, office]
value.posture_basis: similarity is measured between reference/intake coordinates and observed coverage — it does not rest on the coverage being organic, so `show` is consistent with the all-affiliate disclosure distribution

non_claims: product_learning-capped. Not validation, readiness, buyer proof, or willingness-to-pay evidence. Grades and stances are the extraction model's coded reads over captured public content; audience comments are claims by commenters, not verified facts. No dupe edges minted; no person-level claims; authors dropped at normalization.
